tabs.label: Schema
JSON Block Data
tabs.code:
{
  "@type": "form",
  "title": "Contact Us",
  "description": "Fill out this form and we'll get back to you.",
  "default_to": "admin@example.com",
  "default_from": "noreply@example.com",
  "default_subject": "New contact form submission",
  "submit_label": "Send Message",
  "subblocks": [
    {
      "@id": "field-1",
      "field_id": "name",
      "field_type": "text",
      "label": "Your Name",
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "@id": "field-2",
      "field_id": "email",
      "field_type": "from",
      "label": "Email Address",
      "use_as_reply_to": true,
      "required": true
    },
    {
      "@id": "field-3",
      "field_id": "department",
      "field_type": "select",
      "label": "Department",
      "input_values": [
        "Sales",
        "Support",
        "General"
      ],
      "required": false
    },
    {
      "@id": "field-4",
      "field_id": "message",
      "field_type": "textarea",
      "label": "Message",
      "required": true
    }
  ]
}

{#if block.description}

{block.description}
